common.empty: No data available for the current view.
common.noIncidents: No integration incidents in the current slice.

overview.title: Integration Operations
overview.description: Operational surface for Telegram, push diagnostics, websocket tickets, and callback-aware integration posture.
overview.routesDescription: Move directly into Telegram operations, push diagnostics, and realtime topic tooling from one operator shell.

routes.telegram: Lookup Telegram-linked users, bootstrap bot-facing identities, inspect config, and generate login links.
routes.push: Inspect current operator notification preferences and test FCM registration flows.
routes.realtime: Mint websocket tickets and subscribe to monitoring topics for live incident visibility.

overview.healthDescription: Shared health signals pulled from monitoring and callback surfaces.
overview.channelsDescription: Current operator linkage and bot-access posture without leaving the admin shell.

channelCards.telegramLinked: Current operator is linked to Telegram ID {telegramId}.
channelCards.telegramUnlinked: Current operator does not have Telegram linkage in the current session payload.
channelCards.pushSummary: {enabled} of 5 notification channels are currently enabled for this operator.
channelCards.botRulesUrl: Bot rules URL is currently exposed at {url}.
channelCards.botSecretNote: Bot-secret proxy is not configured or upstream bot settings are unavailable.

overview.incidentsDescription: Recent invalid callback records coming from the governance webhook log.

telegram.title: Telegram Control Surface
telegram.description: Lookup Telegram-linked VPN users, exercise bot-facing flows, bootstrap identities, and mint operator login links.

metrics.accessModeHint: Bot-side access settings returned via admin proxy.
metrics.catalogHint: Active plans available for manual subscription creation.
metrics.botPlansHint: Bot-facing plan entries exposed by backend.

telegram.accessDescription: Read the bot-facing access settings and catalog coverage without exposing the bot secret to the browser.

accessCards.botSettingsSummary: Bot access is configured. Current channel ID: {channelId}.
accessCards.botCatalogSummary: Bot-facing plans are reachable through the admin-side proxy.

telegram.lookupDescription: Inspect a Telegram ID, generate one-time bot login links, refresh the bot-facing user, and activate trial flow when needed.
telegram.subscriptionDescription: Use the current plan catalog to create a subscription for the selected Telegram-linked user.
telegram.bootstrapDescription: Optional fields used when refreshing a bot-facing user payload from the admin shell.
telegram.emptyLookup: Enter a Telegram ID and inspect it to load Telegram surfaces.
telegram.trialSummary: Current trial window reports {days} days remaining.

push.title: Push & Preference Diagnostics
push.description: Visibility into the current operator notification preferences plus self-service FCM token registration diagnostics.

metrics.channelsHint: Current notification posture for this operator.
metrics.deviceHint: Current device ID used for FCM diagnostics.
metrics.scopeHint: Backend lacks a global FCM admin inventory today.

push.preferencesDescription: Adjust the current operator notification routes and persist the preference state through the backend.
push.fcmDescription: Exercise the current self-service FCM endpoints to validate token registration and unregister flows.

realtime.title: Realtime Topic Console
realtime.description: Mint websocket tickets, validate monitoring topic access, and inspect live monitoring messages from the admin shell.

metrics.ticketHint: Single-use ticket lifetime returned by backend.
metrics.availableTopicsHint: Allowed topics reported after websocket connect.
metrics.trafficHint: Current total traffic from monitoring stats.

realtime.ticketDescription: Issue a short-lived websocket ticket, open a monitoring socket, and disconnect cleanly when diagnostics are done.
realtime.topicDescription: Select topics to subscribe once the websocket is open. The backend will report which topics are allowed for the current role.
realtime.connectionSummary: Selected topics in the current request batch: {topics}.
